mapper.insert: INSERT INTO experience_share ( title, type, category, summary, content, file_url, file_name, emp_no, branch_name, submit_time, remark, status, create_by, create_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{type}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{empNo}, #{branchName}, #{submitTime}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM experience_share WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM experience_share
is_deleted = 0
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY submit_time DESC
